name: chainvet
description: Analyze Solidity smart contracts for security vulnerabilities inside VS Code, via the ChainVet language server.

chainvet.serverPath.description: Path to the chainvet-lsp language server binary (on PATH by default).

chainvet.aiReports.enabled.description: AI review of findings via a local Ollama. Drops likely false positives and annotates findings, but adds latency to each scan.

chainvet.aiFallbackParser.enabled.description: Use the AI fallback parser when both solc and tree-sitter fail to parse a file (requires a local Ollama).

chainvet.ai.endpoint.description: Ollama endpoint for the AI features.

chainvet.ai.model.description: Ollama model for the AI features.
